notes: Keeps legitimate edible-with-caution and edible-with-preparation mushrooms in normal edible routes; caution/prep remain warning badges and notes, not route blockers.

Blocks emergency-only, survival-only, medicinal-only, tea-extract-only, warning/comparison, and non-food-target records from normal edible mushroom routes while keeping them visible in appropriate caution, other-use, medicinal, search, or detail contexts.
Treats explicit warning/comparison use roles as non-food unless the record also has a real food/edible role or food-valid status.
Adds Food to the Uses tag for edible cards whose explicit use_roles only listed comparison context, so edible-with-caution records still read as food-valid while keeping comparison notes.
Includes the v4.3.165 Other Uses list-note behavior so this package can be applied over v4.3.164 if needed.
